Welcome, Test User (user@example.com)

Set up Direct Debit

Bank Transfer allows you to pay directly from your bank account using the Direct Debit service.

New Direct Debit mandates may take up to 3 working days to be approved. After approval it may take a further 4 working days before any funds are debited from your account.

ParentPay will treat Bank Transfer payments as received instantly, however please note that your school may choose not to supply goods and services while payments are ‘pending’ and yet to be collected from your bank account.

To use Bank Transfer, you need to set up a Direct Debit.

You will need:

  • Name of account holder
  • Account number
  • Sort code

Set up Auto top-up

You will be required to set up Bank Transfer to use Auto top-up.

Bank Transfer allows you to pay directly from your bank account using the Direct Debit service.

New Direct Debit mandates may take up to 3 working days to be approved. After approval it may take a further 4 working days before any funds are debited from your account.

ParentPay will treat Bank Transfer payments as received instantly, however please note that your school may choose not to supply goods and services while payments are ‘pending’ and yet to be collected from your bank account.

To use Bank Transfer, you need to set up a Direct Debit.

You will need:

  • Name of account holder
  • Account number
  • Sort code

Payment items

One-click payments are currently unavailable. Please try again later.
Action required: Negative balance.
Your Auto top-up is suspended due to a negative balance. To resume automatic payments clear the negative balance here.
Action required: Negative balance.
Please clear the negative balance here to set up Auto top-up.
Action required: No bank account.
Auto top-up is currently suspended as there is no linked bank account. Add your bank details to restart automatic payments.
Please enter an amount
You are no longer able to make a payment for this trip, please contact your school
You are no longer able to confirm a place on this trip, please contact your school
Please choose a payment option
Please enter an amount between the Min - £/Max £ (set by school).
You have exceeded the limit of £9,999.99 for One-click payments. Please enter a lower amount.
Please enter an amount between min & max
You cannot pay for this item with One-click payments as the cost exceeds the limit for One-click payments. Please use another method of payment.
Please tick the consent box
Please enter notes into the box
Invalid quantity amount, please enter whole number between the Min/Max amounts
We’re unable to save your additional information. Please try again later.
Please provide all the requested information before continuing
We are unable to take your payment at present. Please try again later.
We are unable to register your confirmation at present. Please try again later.
We were unable to add your item to the basket. Please try again later.
We’re unable to edit Auto top-up at present. Please try again later.
We’re unable to set up Auto top-up at present. Please try again later.
We’re unable to cancel Auto top-up at present. Please try again later.
We’re unable to pause Auto top-up at present. Please try again later.
We’re unable to start Auto top-up at present. Please try again later.
We have been unable to top-up 's  balance. Please try again.

The requested information has been successfully updated

Your bank account has been successfully set up

Auto top-up successfully edited.

Auto top-up successfully set up.
 - .

Auto top-up successfully cancelled.

Auto top-up successfully paused.

Auto top-up successfully started.

Your scheduled payment of £ has been restarted.

Monitor your balance with ease, set up balance alerts here.

Your scheduled payment of £ has been added.

Payment will be deducted from your bank by Direct Debit within 3 working days*

Your total spend for each day may be collected as a single payment or as itemised payments.

*For new Direct Debit mandates, funds may take up to 7 working days to be deducted from your bank

Balance is now £.

Additional information

The school requires the following information to be completed.

*please note, if you do not wish to share this information with linked parents/carers, you must provide it directly to the school before completing payment.

The school requires the following information to be completed.

On this occasion, you will have to contact the school directly to update it.

Emergency contact details

Emergency contact
characters remaining
characters remaining
characters remaining

Medical details

Does your child have any medical conditions?

characters remaining

Does your child require any medication?

characters remaining

Allergies and dietary requirements

Does your child have any dietary requirements?

Hold down the Ctrl (windows) / Command (Mac) button to select multiple options.
characters remaining

Hold down the Ctrl (windows) / Command (Mac) button to select multiple options.

Auto top-up

Auto top-up has already been enabled by another payer.

Auto top-up cannot be set up with a negative balance.

Please clear the negative balance first and Auto top-up will become available.

When would you like to top up?

Shared information

Are you sure you want to untick this box? Any information you've entered will not be saved.

Confirm Auto top-up

Your account will be topped upyour chosen amount. You can pause or adjust this anytime.

Cancel Auto top-up

This will permanently remove your Auto top-up settings. You’ll need to set up new payment details if you want to restart automatic payments in the future.
